title: Sardine Symphony
description: A tangy and chewy Irish dish featuring sardines that is both romantic and nut-free-friendly.
instructions: Remove sardines from oil and pat dry with paper towels.
Combine lemon juice, white wine vinegar, olive oil, minced garlic, salt, and pepper in a bowl. Mix well until all ingredients are fully combined.
Place the dill sprigs around the edges of the baking dish to create an attractive design.
Layer sardines on top of the dill sprigs, ensuring they cover the entire bottom layer.
Pour the prepared marinade over the top and sides of the sardines evenly.
Bake for 20-30 minutes or until the surface is golden brown and the sardines are crispy.
Let it cool slightly before serving. Garnish with fresh herbs like parsley or dill if desired.
